AlphaPolicy.description: Alpha channel policy for a given platform budget.

AssetRole.description:
The six-role vocabulary for asset classification.

Roles are deliberately distinct, even when some have empty user populations today. Downstream tasks add new evidence for `Derived` and `Mirror Target`; modelling them now keeps the on-disk schema stable.

oneOf.description: The original, hand-authored art for an asset family.
The build output that ships with the game.
Anything generated from a Source by Workmen (previews, mirrored copies, packed atlases, ...).
A copy of a Runtime asset created for a specific target platform (web/iOS/Android) by a separate export pipeline. Always linked back to one Runtime asset.
An asset that exists but is intentionally out of scope for the active profile (deprecated, rejected, license-blocked, ...).
A scanned file that we could not classify with the available evidence. Held in the Unclassified Queue until the user resolves it.

Compression.description: Compression codec negotiated for the runtime asset on a platform.

NamingRule.description: A naming rule applied before raising naming violations.

Platform.description: Target platform a Profile budgets for.

PlatformBudget.description: A platform-specific budget used by the validator.

colorSpace.description: Free-form string describing the color space (e.g. `"sRGB"`).

PotNpot.description: Whether the platform requires power-of-two texture dimensions.

oneOf.description: Strictly power-of-two. Non-POT assets are validation errors.

ProfileException.description:
A bounded, auditable exception to a Profile rule.

`expires_at` is an ISO-8601 timestamp string (`chrono` is intentionally avoided for this task to keep the dependency surface small — future revisions will replace `String` with `chrono::DateTime<Utc>`).

ProfileMatcher.description:
A predicate that selects assets into a Profile.

Each field is optional. An empty [`ProfileMatcher`] matches every asset — usually a bug, but legitimate for the "default" Profile.

assetRole.description: Optional role filter; `None` accepts any role.

namingPattern.description: Regex-style naming pattern (the syntax T5 will pin down).

pathGlob.description: Project-relative glob (`.workmen`-style anchored to project root).

ProfileState.description:
Lifecycle state of a [`Profile`].

* `Draft` — the profile is being edited; not authoritative. * `Active` — the profile is the contract of record. * `Locked` — the profile cannot be edited; bumps require explicit unlock with a non-empty reason.

SourceRuntimeRelationship.description: Declared edge between a Source asset and a Runtime asset.

description:
The Workmen profile contract. See module docs for field semantics.

The `schema_version` field is deserialized through a custom function that enforces the supported version. Unknown versions fail at deserialization time (rather than at first use) so a stale cache or stale in-memory copy never silently disagrees with the on-disk file.
title: Profile
